text.title: AI Layout Review Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for the layout-review-decision artifact the designer emits per AI-generated mockup. Must be satisfied before the mockup is marked ship-ready.

field.name: research_artifact_ref
field.notes: must resolve to a real, dated research artifact

field.name: checks
field.notes: exactly one entry per c01..c10, each with verdict + evidence_pointer

field.name: rationale
field.notes: required for any verdict other than APPROVE

forbidden.pattern: verdict = APPROVE with any check entry marked BLOCK
research_artifact_ref absent or points to a placeholder ("see Figma file" with no link)
ai_tool_attestation missing or claims "unknown" — provenance must be recorded even for retroactive review
reviewer_id = the same AI tool that generated the mockup (must be a designer or a different model)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Auto-fill ai_tool_attestation.tool_version from the Figma plugin metadata when present.
Auto-run token_compliance_report via design-token diff script and attach output verbatim.
Collapse repeat off-token instances of the same value into a single line in the report.

list.item: research_artifact_ref resolves to a real document
Edge-state coverage (empty / loading / error / realistic-data) confirmed in c04
Reviewer is not the generating tool
